meaning: n.特殊化,专门化,特化作用
examples: A caste system consists of ranked groups, each with a different economic specialization.
Hundreds of others are more obscure in their meanings and testify to the amazing specialization in medieval arts, crafts and functions.
Evidence of specialization in producing raw materials and in manufacturing ceramics and textiles indicates differentiation of labor within and between communities.
In classic economics, a marriage is, at least in part, an exercise in labor specialization.
Liberal arts students are not confined to one specific area of specialization like the areas McCrory prefers.
